mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification(user_id, title, content, type, is_read) VALUES(#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{isRead})
mapper.update: UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notification SET is_read = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
